creator: wkwu@ccbsd1.csie.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Login to the yp-client has no problem, but when change password:
% passwd
Changing NIS password for user on server.
Old Password:
New password:
Retype new password:
passwd: failed to change NIS password: RPC: Server can't decode arguments

If I change the user password on YP-server
(directly edit the passwd.adjunct and make)
The user can change only once on yp-client.

Fix: 

No idea. I just wondered why the user can change their password
only once after I edit the passwd.adjunct?
How-To-Repeat: 
Trivial.
